posts.text:
Trump discusses “liberating Iranians.”


Tymofiy Mylovanov (@Mylovanov)

CNN: Would you be OK with a religious leader in Iran?

Trump: Yes. It doesn't necessarily have to be a democratic leader in Iran. 

It just has to be somebody who treats the U.S. and Israel fairly as well as people in the countries in the rest of the Middle East.

posts.text: [VIDEO: Students Are Accusing Food Of Racism] students at Oberlin College are very much concerned with what one of the cafes is serving its students now there's lots to talk about cultural appropriation but I'm unclear as to whether or not this story falls under that category so we'll have a discussion about it now the students at this school are concerned because there are all sorts of ethnic foods being served as authentic when in reality they're not authentic at all there's Sushi that's being served that's not very Sushi esque there is Vietnamese food being served that is not actual authentic Vietnamese food and so students who are from those cultures are worried about these Foods misrepresenting what their actual Cuisine is all about one of those students is tamoyo Joi he's a junior at oberin college and here's what he has to say

posts.text: [VIDEO: Is There Still Hope To Save The Planet?] climate change continues to be a hot button issue that a lot of countries including the US aren't doing enough about however almost 200 countries came together in Paris and they agreed that there needs to be a goal of lowering Greenhouse emissions to do something about climate change at least mitigate the impact of climate change now uh the climate change agreement was prepared over the course of two years including two intense weeks of meetings in Paris the deal is meant to add structure to efforts that are already underway to reduce greenhouse gas emissions nearly every country has submitted a plan and I want to show you guys a quick chart of what the goal is now if we do absolutely nothing whatsoever by the year 2030 or actually uh 2100 Jesus Christ that's a long time away but not that
